top_signals.title: AstraZeneca Broadens US Growth Push
top_signals.summary: AstraZeneca CFO Aradhana Sarin discusses how the pharmaceutical company is broadening its US shareholder base and plans to generate $80 Billion in revenue by 2030. She speaks with Bloomberg's Katie Greifeld. (Source: Bloomberg)
